sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n87189" key="proekkopro/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">προεκ-κοπρόω</orth>, <sense id="n87189.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">remove faeces first,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0715.tlg001:3:43" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Paul.Aeg.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3.43</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
